item.title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Principia [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Principia
(Various Games)
Principia is a sandbox physics game originally released in November 2013. It is the successor to the 2011 Android hit game "Apparatus". In August of 2022 Principia was released as open source, and is now being developed as an open source project by the Principia community.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: MyTonWallet [Crypto]
item.itunes:title: MyTonWallet [Crypto]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
MyTonWallet
(Crypto)
The most feature-rich web wallet and browser extension for the TON Network – with support of jettons, NFT, TON DNS, TON Sites, TON Proxy, and TON Magic.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: Samsung One UI Apps Port [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Samsung One UI Apps Port [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ayrahikari
item.itunes:summary:
Samsung One UI Apps Port
(Utilities)
Samsung One UI Apps Mod/Port stuff, can be used for any rom than one ui.
Requirements based on main thread

item.title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: sysi [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: djmaxcz
item.itunes:summary:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.description:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sysi
(System Monitoring)
SYSI is a powerful and user-friendly terminal application designed to provide a comprehensive overview of your system's health and status. sysi displays vital system information, inspirational quotes, humorous jokes, and fun facts, all within a visually appealing, color-coded, text-based interface.
Centralized and Concise System Information:
Memory and Swap Usage: Displays current memory and swap usage with percentages.

CPU Details: Shows CPU model, cores, threads, and temperature if available.

GPU Information: Includes GPU model and temperature (with support for Nvidia, AMD, and Intel GPUs if lm_sensors is installed).

Disk Usage: Provides an overview of disk usage, including mounted drives.

Battery Status: Shows battery state, percentage, and time to full charge.

Network Interfaces: Optionally display detailed network interface information.

System Uptime and Time: Displays the system uptime and current time.

Color-Coded Text:

The script utilizes ANSI escape codes to display color-coded text, enhancing readability and making important information stand out.

Inspirational Quotes, Humor and fun facts:

Random Quote: Displays a random inspirational or insightful quote about programming or technology.

Programming Jokes: Adds a touch of humor by displaying a random programming-related joke.

Shares a random fun fact related to technology or computing.

and more


[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo"
sudo zypper addrepo "https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo"

Use: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper install ClamAV-GUI

For Ubuntu (UALinux repository): https://ualinux.com/en/ubuntu-apps-other/clamav-gui
How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE - 15.5 / 15.6 / Tumbleweed:

How to add a repository: https://ualinux.com/en/how-to-connect
[read more]

item.title: Camera Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Camera Picture Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytool
item.itunes:summary:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]
item.description:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Camera Picture Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Award winning Camera Picture Recovery Software available at website www.datarecoverysoftware.in provide best solution to regain entire formatted or missing data from bad sector of user snaps storage device. Image restoration utility has inbuilt standard scanning and searching algorithm to undelete entire accidently deleted photograph. Affordable data recovery software easily retrieves entire lost or erased data from different type of device like Novelty, Specialty, professional or other digital camera.

[read more]

item.title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
432Hz Player
(Audioplayers)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

432Hz Player

Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm with low CPU usage. It also auto-detects the music exact pitch for precise tuning.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

item.title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:title: 432Hz Batch Converter [Audio Extractors/Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

432Hz Batch Converter

Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/432hz-Batch-Converter

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]

432Hz Batch Converter
(Audio Extractors/Converters)
Most music is recorded in 440Hz. Many people claim that 432Hz resonates more with the heart whereas 440Hz resonates more with the brain, and that 432Hz music feels better. Try it yourself. Play a music in 440Hz and in 432Hz, and see which one you prefer. Most people choose the 432Hz version, and it's hard to go back to 440Hz.
This application re-encodes your audio files while shifting the pitch to 432hz. It uses a very high-quality pitch-shifting algorithm.

item.title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Powerliminals Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Powerliminals Player
(Audioplayers)
Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later) and Linux (all distros).

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Powerliminals-Player

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com
[read more]
item.description:
Powerliminals Player

Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/powerliminals-nonrivalry

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

[read more]

Powerliminals Player

Plays Powerliminal audios, which are nearly-silent audios containing very high-frequency energies to play in the background. You can stack 10 to 30 audios at varying speeds to play in the background day and night, selecting the balance of energies that you need.

Here's a free Powerliminal on YouTube. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jdcWwWM6hQg

I can play 25 audios with ~3% CPU usage.

item.title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:title: Yang YouTube Downloader [Video Converters]
item.itunes:author: hanuman
item.itunes:summary:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

Installation instructions
https://github.com/mysteryx93/HanumanInstituteApps/wiki/Yang-YouTube-Downloader

From Etienne Charland aka Hanuman, by a lightworker in his free time.
https://www.spiritualselftransformation.com/
[read more]
item.description:
Yang YouTube Downloader
(Video Converters)
Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)

[read more]

Yet another YouTube downloader? Most downloaders do not give the best quality as they choose the wrong streams and re-encode them.
This downloader allows you to get either the MP4 or VP9 videos, and the AAC or Opus audios, without re-encoding to preserve the best quality. While VP9 is 35% more efficient than MP4 for videos, some videos have 40-60% smaller file sizes in VP9 format! It will automatically select the best-quality video based on file sizes. It can even combine MP4 videos with Opus audios in a MKV file, although not all players will support it. I haven't seen any other downloader that can produce a MKV file with the best video and audio without re-encoding anything.

Supports Windows (Win 7 SP1 or later), Linux (all distros) and MacOS (10.15 or later)
